description: A versatile rich text content block for long-form writing. Renders a body of rich HTML text with an optional heading above it. Use for article body text, about-us descriptions, policy content, or any free-form written content. Layout: full-width text column centered with configurable max-width for readability.
label: Paragraph

test_data.body:
We are a forward-thinking technology company dedicated to building tools that empower creators and businesses alike. Our mission is to simplify complex workflows and deliver exceptional experiences through innovative software solutions.

Founded in 2018, we have grown from a small startup to a team of over 50 passionate engineers, designers, and strategists. We believe in transparency, collaboration, and relentless improvement — values that guide every product we ship.
test_data.heading: About Our Company
